message:
refactor(region-heap): rename test variables for clarity

Replace single-letter variable names (a, b, c, d, e, f) with
descriptive names (first, second, third, reuse_second, reuse_third,
reuse_first) in the free-list reuse determinism test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
